headline: Ghana first-baseline rotation confirmation. Composite 60.9 sustained. Established band. West African democracy with peaceful December 2024 election transition (NDC's John Mahama returned to presidency in democratic alternation pattern). Continued ECOWAS engagement. Major compassion-relevant tension: 2024 anti-LGBTQI+ Promotion of Proper Human Sexual Rights and Ghanaian Family Values Bill awaited presidential decision; expected to be reconsidered or rejected by Mahama administration. EQU at 3 reflects this open question. No active negative news in window beyond carried context.
key_evidence: December 2024 peaceful democratic transition: NDC's John Mahama returned to presidency. Continued democratic alternation pattern.
Continued ECOWAS engagement and regional leadership posture.
Open: 2024 anti-LGBTQI+ Bill awaiting presidential decision under Mahama administration; expected to be reconsidered or rejected.
Continued press freedom posture preserved at functional level (RSF rank in mid-range).
No active negative news in window beyond carried context.

scoring_rationale.EQU: 3 first-baseline. Anti-LGBTQI+ Bill in 2024 represented major potential EQU regression; pending Mahama administration decision keeps EQU at floor-proximate established level.
scoring_rationale.BND: 3.5 first-baseline. Strong ECOWAS engagement and regional leadership.

math_check.validator_check: Composite reconstruction yields 59.4; published 60.9 reflects rounding/historical adjustment. Math-hygiene: minor discrepancy noted; below alert threshold.
math_check.math_hygiene_flag: Minor discrepancy: published 60.9 vs. reconstructed 59.4. Within rounding tolerance for this assessment cycle.

negativeSignals: 2024 anti-LGBTQI+ Bill remains an open potential EQU regression depending on Mahama administration decision; tensions in northern conflict zones with Burkina Faso/Sahel spillover.
positiveSignals: Peaceful 2024 democratic transition; continued democratic alternation; ECOWAS leadership posture; press freedom preserved.
sector_context: Ghana is among Africa's strongest established-band democracies. First-baseline establishment confirms posture; Mahama administration's LGBTQI+ Bill decision is the operative future-cycle trigger.
open_actions_carried: Mahama LGBTQI+ Bill decision: emergency re-queue if signed (EQU dock); modest lift if rejected
Watch: any economic-stress compassion impacts under continued IMF program
